name: Wuchang: Fallen Feathers (Eclipse perf)
post_apply_message:
Eclipse perf mod applied (or will be, once staged). Recommended Steam Deck settings: 1280x800, TSR scaling, all settings minimum. This mod is PAK-ONLY (no exe swap). The .rar has bare .pak files — place them under payload/mod/Project_Plague/Content/Paks/.

Eclipse's tested Deck hardware setup: GE-Proton (10-15 or newer), TDP 18, GPU clock 1800, CPU/GPU undervolt -50 in BIOS, SDWEAK enabled. IMPORTANT: this mod targets a SPECIFIC game build (1.4.1 / build 19447727). If Steam updates the game past that, the modded exe may crash — Revert this recipe (restores the original exe from .gfm-orig) and wait for an updated mod. The mod is NOT in git (it contains a modified copyrighted game exe); stage it into your local-payloads folder first — see notes.
notes: Eclipse Steam Deck graphics-optimisation mod. Mod files are NOT committed (modified copyrighted game exe + large paks) — they live in your local-payloads folder off git. To stage: extract the Eclipse .rar, then copy the CONTENTS of its inner '(flat — paks only)' folder into <local-payloads>/eclipse-wuchang/payload/mod/ so you end up with payload/mod/Project_Plague/Content/Paks/Project_Plague-Windows_1_p.pak. Then Apply copies that over the game dir, backing up replaced files. Source: Eclipse on Nexus (wuchangfallenfeathers/mods/341).
